--- title: "3. Basic Workflow: Model Specification, Bundle, & MCMC" output: rmarkdown::html_vignette: highlight: null code_folding: show vignette: > %\VignetteIndexEntry{3. Basic Workflow: Model Specification, Bundle, & MCMC} %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown} %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8} --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (Introduction, Model Spec, MCMC Workflow, Unconditional/Conditional/Causal, Backends, S3 Reference). # Workflow Overview DPmixGPD uses a direct two-step workflow: 1. **Bundle** (`build_nimble_bundle`): Generate NIMBLE code and compile the sampler. 2. **MCMC** (`run_mcmc_bundle_manual`): Execute posterior sampling. --- ## Phase 1: Bundle (NIMBLE Code Generation & Compilation) **Purpose**: Generate NIMBLE model code, compile sampler, prepare for MCMC execution. ### Building Directly ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Load packaged data data("nc_pos200_k3") y <- nc_pos200_k3$y # Direct call bundle_direct <- build_nimble_bundle( y = y, kernel = "gamma", backend = "crp", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) print("Direct bundle creation successful.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Direct bundle creation successful.\n" ``` ::: ::: ### Inspecting Bundle Contents ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Bundle is an S3 object with structure cat("Bundle class:", class(bundle_direct), "\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Bundle class: dpmixgpd_bundle ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} cat("Bundle contains:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Bundle contains: ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(names(bundle_direct)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "spec" "code" "constants" "dimensions" "data" [6] "inits" "monitors" "mcmc" "epsilon" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # Access key components cat("\nMCMC settings:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MCMC settings: ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(bundle_direct$mcmc_settings) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` NULL ``` ::: ::: --- ## Phase 3: MCMC Execution **Purpose**: Run posterior sampling from the compiled bundle. ### Basic MCMC Run ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Run MCMC fit <- load_or_fit("v03-basic-model-compile-run-fit", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_direct, show_progress = FALSE)) cat("Fit object class:", class(fit), "\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Fit object class: mixgpd_fit list ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} cat("MCMC execution complete. Posterior samples collected.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MCMC execution complete. Posterior samples collected. ``` ::: ::: ### Accessing Posterior Samples ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Posterior summary print("\n--- POSTERIOR SUMMARY ---\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n--- POSTERIOR SUMMARY ---\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 200 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1 WAIC: 929.279 lppd: -399.887 | pWAIC: 64.752 Summary table
parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess
weights[1] 0.684 0.216 0.36 0.63 1 25.041
alpha 0.559 0.388 0.028 0.498 1.526 204.872
shape[1] 1.784 0.847 0.943 1.483 3.912 27.633
scale[1] 0.494 0.343 0.212 0.35 1.402 59.82
``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # Posterior mean parameters in original form params_fit <- params(fit) params_fit ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.559" $w [1] "0.684" $shape [1] "1.784" $scale [1] "0.494" ``` ::: ::: ### Diagnostic Plots ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Trace plots if (interactive()) plot(fit, params = "alpha|beta", family = c("traceplot", "running", "autocorrelation")) ``` ::: --- ## Complete Workflow: End-to-End Example ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Load packaged data data("nc_pos200_k3") y_data <- nc_pos200_k3$y # PHASE 1: Bundle bundle_final <- build_nimble_bundle( y = y_data, kernel = "gamma", backend = "crp", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) # PHASE 2: MCMC fit_final <- load_or_fit("v03-basic-model-compile-run-fit_final", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_final, show_progress = FALSE)) print("\n=== THREE-PHASE WORKFLOW COMPLETE ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n=== THREE-PHASE WORKFLOW COMPLETE ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_final) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 200 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1 WAIC: 943.55 lppd: -417.985 | pWAIC: 53.791 Summary table
parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess
weights[1] 0.701 0.192 0.39 0.665 1 27.636
alpha 0.543 0.388 0.037 0.464 1.511 183.632
shape[1] 1.599 0.622 0.926 1.422 3.312 35.47
scale[1] 0.409 0.266 0.198 0.299 1.132 40.43
``` ::: ::: --- ## Backend Comparison: CRP vs Stick-Breaking ### CRP Backend ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Chinese Restaurant Process bundle_crp <- build_nimble_bundle( y = y_data, kernel = "gamma", backend = "crp", components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) fit_crp <- load_or_fit("v03-basic-model-compile-run-fit_crp", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_crp, show_progress = FALSE)) print("CRP execution complete.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "CRP execution complete.\n" ``` ::: ::: ### Stick-Breaking Backend ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Stick-Breaking Process bundle_sb <- build_nimble_bundle( y = y_data, kernel = "gamma", backend = "sb", components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) fit_sb <- load_or_fit("v03-basic-model-compile-run-fit_sb", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_sb, show_progress = FALSE)) print("SB execution complete.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "SB execution complete.\n" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Kernel Selection Guide ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} kernels_available <- c("gamma", "lognormal", "normal", "laplace", "invgauss", "amoroso", "cauchy") cat("Available kernels:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Available kernels: ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} for (k in kernels_available) { cat(" -", k, "\n") } ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` - gamma - lognormal - normal - laplace - invgauss - amoroso - cauchy ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("\nChoose kernel based on:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\nChoose kernel based on:\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" gamma: Right-skewed, positive support\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " gamma: Right-skewed, positive support\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" lognormal: Log-transformed normality\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " lognormal: Log-transformed normality\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" normal: Symmetric, unbounded\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " normal: Symmetric, unbounded\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" laplace: Sharp peak, exponential tails\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " laplace: Sharp peak, exponential tails\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" invgauss: Positive, near-normal shape\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " invgauss: Positive, near-normal shape\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" amoroso: Generalized, maximum flexibility\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " amoroso: Generalized, maximum flexibility\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" cauchy: Heavy-tailed, rare cases\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " cauchy: Heavy-tailed, rare cases\n" ``` ::: ::: --- ## GPD Tail Augmentation ### Unconditional with GPD ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Data with tail behavior data("nc_pos_tail200_k4") y_tail <- nc_pos_tail200_k4$y # Build with GPD bundle_gpd <- build_nimble_bundle( y = y_tail, kernel = "gamma", backend = "sb", GPD = TRUE, components = 6, mcmc = mcmc ) fit_gpd <- load_or_fit("v03-basic-model-compile-run-fit_gpd", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_gpd, show_progress = FALSE)) print("\nGPD augmentation applied to tail region.\n") summary(fit_gpd) ``` ::: --- ## Summary of Key Functions | Phase | Function | Input | Output | |-------|----------|-------|--------| | **1. Bundle** | `build_nimble_bundle()` | y, X (optional), kernel, backend, GPD, components | `dpmixgpd_bundle` | | **2. MCMC** | `run_mcmc_bundle_manual()` | bundle | `mixgpd_fit` | --- ## Common Parameter Settings ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} print("=== Recommended MCMC Parameters ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "=== Recommended MCMC Parameters ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Quick test: niter=500, nburnin=100, nchains=1\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Quick test: niter=500, nburnin=100, nchains=1\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Standard: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=2\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Standard: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=2\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Production: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=3\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Production: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=3\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("\n=== Backend Parameters ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n=== Backend Parameters ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Use components=3-5 for both backends in this implementation.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Use components=3-5 for both backends in this implementation.\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("\n=== Kernel Selection ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n=== Kernel Selection ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Positive data: gamma, lognormal, invgauss\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Positive data: gamma, lognormal, invgauss\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Any real data: normal\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Any real data: normal\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Symmetric tails: laplace\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Symmetric tails: laplace\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Extreme outliers: cauchy\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Extreme outliers: cauchy\n" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Next Steps - Move to **vignette 6-7** for unconditional models (CRP vs SB backends) - Move to **vignette 8-9** for tail modeling with GPD - Move to **vignette 10-13** for conditional models with covariates - Move to **vignette 14-19** for causal inference workflows
